title: BetterEndCities
description: Enhances End Cities and their loot with improved structure designs and better exploration rewards.
body:
This mod Improves End Cities and Ships.
 Enhances End Cities and their loot with improved structure designs and better exploration rewards.
[Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-end-cities)


![Icon](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1nazHFhhwW-9b5kBptfxh-OVX-mb_6_Ka)

Make sure to download my mod 😊

 

This mod make end cities and ships looks beautiful.

 

Just a little pack that changes the structure of the endship in the ship.nbt file.

![ship no rtx](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1vkw8E5YFz54VHgLxza-GFCZ0lErCJ9DY)
